name: vmprint
description: Deterministic typesetting engine for the programmable web. Pure-JS, zero-browser document composition with bit-perfect PDF output.
author: cosmiciron

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=contracts && npm run build --workspace=engine && npm run build --workspace=markdown-core && npm run build --workspace=contexts/pdf && npm run build --workspace=contexts/pdf-lite && npm run build --workspace=font-managers/local && npm run build --workspace=font-managers/standard && npm run build --workspace=cli && npm run build --workspace=draft2final && npm run build --workspace=@vmprint/transmuter-mkd-mkd && npm run build --workspace=@vmprint/transmuter-mkd-academic && npm run build --workspace=@vmprint/transmuter-mkd-literature && npm run build --workspace=@vmprint/transmuter-mkd-manuscript && npm run build --workspace=@vmprint/transmuter-mkd-screenplay
